name: apache2-data
title: apache2-data
description:
Apache HTTP Server (common files)
The Apache HTTP Server Project's goal is to build a secure, efficient and
extensible HTTP server as standards-compliant open source software. The
result has long been the number one web server on the Internet.
.
This package contains architecture-independent common files such as icons,
error pages and static index files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use apache2-data because Apache HTTP Server (common files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use apache2-data as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair apache2-data with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `apache2-data --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
